results.title: NLC India Signs MoU with IIT Kanpur to Accelerate AI and Digital Transformation
results.description: NLC India Limited has signed an MoU with IIT Kanpur to collaborate on Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, capacity building, and digital transformation initiatives to enhance operational efficiency and innovation.

results.title: Sacred Pahandi Continues: Lord Balabhadra Moves Towards His Chariot Amid Devotion
results.description: #ଟ ାହିଆ_ହଲେଇ_ଅନେଇଲେ_ବଡଠାକୁର ଟାହିଆ ହଲେଇ ଝୁଲି ଝୁଲି ରଥରେ ବିଜେ କରୁଛନ୍ତି ପ୍ରଭୁ ଶ୍ରୀବଳଭଦ୍ର । ଭକ୍ତିଭାବରେ ଉଛୁଳି ପଡୁଛି ବଡଦାଣ୍ଡ । ଜୟ ଜଗନ୍ନାଥ ଧ୍ବନିରେ ପ୍ରକମ୍ପିତ ଚତୁର୍ଦ୍ଦିଗ । #PuriRathYatra #RathYatra2026 #LordBalabhadra #LordJagannath Pahandi #Puri #OdishaTV #otv For latest news updates follow us on WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaYNIW78qIzrtKKZiD3M OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel. results.title: Government cruel for ignoring Wangchuk’s fast: CJP founder
results.description: New Delhi, July 16: Activist Sonam Wangchuk was under round-the-clock medical supervision on Wednesday as he completed the 18th day of his hunger strike, with Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) founder Abhijeet Dipke accusing the government of being “cruel” for refusing to engage in dialogue with the protesters. The CJP’s protest at Jantar Mantar entered [...] The post Government cruel for ignoring Wangchuk’s fast: CJP founder appeared first on News Today | First with the news .

results.title: NGT takes suo motu on Tiruvallur ammonia leak, issues notices to authorities
results.description: The bench has also taken suo motu cognizance of the illegal felling of 200 teak trees in Chalakudy, relating to the unauthorised cutting and sale of teak trees in the Chalakudy Forest Division of Kerala.

results.title: Pravin Jadhav, Fintech Unicorn Founder, Says Bank Rejected His Home Loan Despite INR 1.2 Billion Valuation
results.description: Pravin Jadhav, founder and CEO of fintech unicorn Raise Financial Services, has sparked a discussion on startup founders' access to retail credit after revealing that a leading private bank rejected his home loan application, allegedly because he was classified as a 'high-risk' borrower due to being an entrepreneur.

results.title: Massive Landslides Continue to Disrupt Tawang-Thingbu Road
results.description: নিউ মালিং অঞ্চলত পাহাৰৰ পৰা বৃহৎ শিল বাগৰি পৰাৰ লগতে বহু পৰিমাণৰ বোকা জমা হোৱাৰ ফলত পথটোৰ তিনিটা মুখ্য স্থান সম্পূৰ্ণ বন্ধ হৈ পৰিছে ৷

results.title: Tragic Murder of Anesthesiologist in Karnataka: Investigation Underway
results.description: In a tragic incident in Dharwad, Karnataka, Dr Kiran Honannavar, a 45-year-old anesthesiologist, was found murdered in his apartment, while his eight-year-old son suffered multiple stab wounds. The police have taken his wife, Dr Priyanka, into custody for questioning. Initial investigations suggest no outsiders were involved, and the incident may stem from a domestic dispute. As the investigation unfolds, authorities are examining CCTV footage and gathering evidence to determine the motive behind this shocking crime. The community awaits further updates as the police continue their inquiries.
